description_long: This chaise features a modernist design with a high, rectangular backrest and a wide, gently sloped seat, both upholstered in deep burgundy leather. The upholstery is accented with a grid of deep button tufting, creating a plush, quilted appearance. The frame and legs are constructed from dark, polished wood, forming a distinctive curved X-shape that supports the seat and backrest. The seat and backrest are visually segmented into square panels by the tufting, giving the chaise a geometric, structured look. The absence of armrests and the open sides contribute to its minimalist, contemporary aesthetic. The overall form is sleek and inviting, suitable for stylish urban interiors or upscale public spaces.
description: A modern burgundy leather chaise with button-tufted upholstery, a high backrest, and curved wooden legs in an X-shape, exuding a sleek, contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high, rectangular backrest and wide seat with deep button tufting and no armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the chaise's sloped seat, the curvature of the wooden legs, and the profile of the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, unadorned back of the chaise and the dark wooden frame supporting the structure.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the seat's incline, the X-shaped legs, and the tufted upholstery profile.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, rectangular, and vertically oriented, featuring a grid of deep button tufting that creates a quilted, geometric pattern. It is slightly padded and covered in burgundy leather, giving it a plush yet structured appearance.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are made of dark, polished wood and form a distinctive curved X-shape, providing both support and a modern aesthetic. The design is sleek and minimal, with no visible decorative elements beyond the elegant curvature.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is burgundy leather with a prominent button-tufted pattern, creating a grid of square, padded sections. The tufting adds depth and a luxurious, quilted texture to the surface.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two main cushions: one forming the seat and one forming the backrest, both attached and integrated into the frame. Each cushion is segmented by the tufting, giving the appearance of multiple smaller, square panels.
